'''Shepprd Barron''' was a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Corellian Security Force]].

==Biography==
When he retired from the force he helped [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] authorities investigate the activities of an arms dealer who went by the alias of "[[Gundark (arms dealer)|Gundark]]."

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-09-XX -->''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' {{1stm}}
